extraction.description: This screenshot shows the Add project dialog in UiPath Studio Web/Agent Builder while importing an existing project into the solution. The search box is populated, and the project list displays SNOW Assignee Lookup Automation as the selected item, with its details shown in the Project details panel on the right. The Add button is available in the bottom-right corner to confirm importing the selected project.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. In the search field, search for the project by entering the relevant text.
2. Select SNOW Assignee Lookup Automation from the project list.
3. Click on the Add button to import the selected project into the solution.
